queries.query: Create a new agent skill for our incident postmortem workflow from the runbook I just added.
queries.rationale: The user is asking to create an Agent Skill from source material.

queries.query: Please improve the existing SKILL.md for my CSV cleanup helper; it keeps missing the validation step.
queries.rationale: The user explicitly asks to improve an existing skill and mentions SKILL.md.

queries.query: Can you review this skill folder and tell me why the agent doesn't pick it up reliably?
queries.rationale: The user is reviewing a skill and debugging trigger behavior.

queries.query: Rewrite the description so this tool-use workflow activates when people ask about filling PDF forms.
queries.rationale: Optimizing a skill description for activation is in scope.

queries.query: Add trigger queries and output evals for my new database-migration skill.
queries.rationale: Creating skill evals is part of skill testing and iteration.

queries.query: Run the trigger and output evals for this skill and prepare the human review handoff.
queries.rationale: The user is asking to evaluate an Agent Skill and prepare review artifacts.

queries.query: I keep coaching the agent through the same release checklist. Can we teach it that process?
queries.rationale: The user wants to encode a repeatable workflow as a skill even without saying skill.

queries.query: Turn these API docs and examples into something agents can use without rereading the whole docs site every time.
queries.rationale: The user wants source-driven generation of reusable agent instructions.

queries.query: This skill needs a helper script with --help and JSON output; add it and document how agents should run it.
queries.rationale: Bundling scripts for a skill is explicitly covered.

queries.query: Write end-user documentation for how to export CSV files from our app.
queries.rationale: This is user-facing product documentation, not an Agent Skill.

queries.query: Review this Python function for bugs and improve the tests.
queries.rationale: General code review and testing should use other skills, not skill creation.

queries.query: Create a training plan so junior developers learn our deployment process.
queries.rationale: Teaching humans a process is adjacent but not creating an agent skill.

queries.query: Write a Bash script that validates JSON files and prints a summary.
queries.rationale: A standalone script request is not skill packaging or skill instruction design.

queries.query: Fix the YAML frontmatter in this blog post.
queries.rationale: YAML frontmatter alone is too broad; the request is not about SKILL.md.

queries.query: Update my agent settings to use a different default model.
queries.rationale: Agent configuration is separate from authoring Agent Skills.

queries.query: Extract the tables from this PDF and save them as CSV.
queries.rationale: This should activate a PDF/data skill, not skill creation.

queries.query: Design benchmark evals for our search ranking model.
queries.rationale: General model evaluation is outside skill trigger/output eval design.
